creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Status update for sparc64

I could finally build lang/gcc6 natively and use its libstdc++ with sparc64-gcc cross-compiler. Building the bootstrap of Rust and Cargo was straightforward after that. I uploaded the bootstrap on freefall:
https://people.freebsd.org/~dumbbell/rust/sparc64/

I could build and run a Hello World with Cargo. Note that the bootstrapped rustc requires libstdc++ from lang/gcc6.

I'm going to test Rust self-hosting now.
